title: SACRAMENTO
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Cradle-to-Career Data System Act will empower policymakers, educators, and the public to better address disparities in opportunities and improve outcomes for all students in California.",
    "The data system will be critical in identifying and targeting resources to close equity gaps due to learning loss and disproportionate impacts from the COVID-19 crisis.",
    "California lacks a longitudinal data system that tracks individual student progression and outcomes across education levels.",
    "Existing data systems in California do not allow for comparison and analysis across educational segments due to differing definitions for data collection.",
    "The proposed data system will serve as a neutral source of high-quality information for various stakeholders.",
    "The public will have open access to tools such as dashboards, a query builder, fact sheets, and a research library through the data system.",
    "Researchers will be able to request access to restricted data for authorized purposes under the proposed data system.",
    "The data system will provide operational tools that support college and career planning for students and their families."
  ]
}
```
